name: erp-backend
description: ERP backend — 5 NestJS services + @erp/shared. Script orchestrator (KHÔNG dùng npm workspaces: mỗi service có Prisma Client riêng, hoisting sẽ làm đụng độ generated client → mỗi service giữ node_modules độc lập, dùng @erp/shared qua 'file:../shared').

scripts.install:all: npm run install:shared && npm run install:customer && npm run install:inventory && npm run install:sales && npm run install:auth && npm run install:catalog && npm run install:purchasing && npm run install:gateway
scripts.dev:all: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently "npm run dev:customer" "npm run dev:inventory" "npm run dev:sales" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:catalog" "npm run dev:purchasing" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.prisma:all: cd auth-service && npx prisma generate && cd ../customer-service && npx prisma generate && cd ../inventory-service && npx prisma generate && cd ../sales-service && npx prisma generate && cd ../catalog-service && npx prisma generate && cd ../purchasing-service && npx prisma generate
